parameters.name: subject_id
parameters.help_text: The capsule globs the matching coreg + HCR-processed data assets under /root/capsule/data ({sid}*ctl-czstack-hcr-coreg_* and HCR_{sid}_*_processed_*).

parameters.name: feat_workers
parameters.help_text: Parallelism for the z-strip feature extraction. 0 uses the package default (cpu-2).
